function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the current contents of a file under the guild dir. Returns the full text, line count, and a line-numbered view ("   1: ..." prefixes). Use this before edit_file so your search blocks match the file character-for-character. The file must be covered by config.tools.editAllowlist.

file_path.description: Path relative to the guild dir (e.g. 'prompt.md', 'memory.md', 'snippets/intro.md'). Must match an entry in config.tools.editAllowlist. Absolute paths and any path containing '..' are rejected.
